programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Wildlife agents interrogate a felon caught hunting with a firearm; witnesses report a hunter trying to bludgeon a swimming deer from his boat; a duck shot out of season leads agents to a slew of violations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When wildlife agents find an alligator with a fresh bullet wound to the head, nearby anglers are the prime suspects; an injured hunter must be evacuated by helicopter; agents use drones to track crabbers selling their catch across state lines.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A barrage of heavy gunfire in an archery-only area puts wildlife agents on high alert; two boaters are stranded on Catahoula Lake; a hunter is caught in an act of fraud; a veteran agent encounters a high-stakes violation on his final patrol.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When a child is thrown from a boat and badly injured, wildlife agents are first on the scene; a night hunter faces multiple felony charges when agents make a grave discovery, agents confront a jet ski rider who risks drowning and gets belligerent.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Discovering the lives of conservation officers of Montana defending public lands, handling anti-poaching sting operations and more.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Wardens uncover a crime scene while others patrol summer crowds, issuing fines for littering and DUI; amidst the chaos, Captain Jeff Darrah retires after 26 years, leaving a legacy of dedication and bravery.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A stray dog arrives at RAPS in rough shape and the team uncovers his surprising story; William, a street-wise cat, amazes Dr. Maldonado with his resilience; Odin, a German Eurasier, heads into surgery; Karen is handed a huge picking challenge.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A black cat with breathing problems gives the vets a run for their money; Bucky, a senior Labrador, takes a frightening turn during surgery; Lucy the Hedgehog surprises her owner with undetected health issues.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the reopening of the zoo; Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul makes a bid that could bring the Gator Boys back to Everglades Holiday Park; a photo shoot involving alligators takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul handles an emergency in Florida while the boys work nuisance calls along the Mississippi Gulf Coast; a giant alligator attacks Tre.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson must rescue two cats from their cycle of co-dependency before they're kicked out of their owner's house; Jackson is introduced to a couple who shelters four special need felines and a man who struggles with his frisky feline.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat Missy, who seems determined to kill their other cat Fluffy; a tortie named Candy beats up a 9-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Matt gets so scared during a rescue that Tania has to take over; newbie discovers the heartbreak associated with a life in dog rescue; a team favorite finally gets her shot at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia races to save the life of a dog that's been shot; a scared and sick puppy running loose near heavy traffic is pursued by Matt and Lizzy; Tia faces an agonizing decision after a home inspection raises red-flags.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team are in Mississippi to meet a BFRO investigator, who has a new way of looking for Bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team treks to Mt. Shasta, California, where they team-up with the SBC, a paranormal investigation group who tries to convince Bobo that Bigfoots are in fact supernatural.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The Klamath reservation in Southern Oregon has a reputation where Bigfoot sightings are fairly normal, but no one dares travel to a specific canyon after dark.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to the Himalayas in Nepal where they visit monasteries with Yeti relics and talk to people who claim to have witnesses the creature as they search of the legendary Yeti.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: An incoming storm threatens to cut the siblings' Alaska trip short; a surprise news from Billy sends them on a quest to reunite with an old friend; Noah struggles to train his new war horse, Prometheus.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: After the summer's devastating wildfire, the Wolfpack is eager to reestablish roots back on their mountain ranch; as they race to build a new Boomtown-inspired base camp, an unexpected tragedy strikes and the family must grieve one of its own.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: "Alaskan Bush People" is a reality-documentary series that introduces the Brown family -- Billy, wife Ami and their seven grown children who -- according to Discovery -- are interesting because "they are unlike any other family in America." The channel says they are so far removed from civilization that they often go six to nine months each year without seeing an outsider. They refer to themselves as a "wolf pack" and, perhaps due to isolation, have their own accent and dialect. The Browns live in the Copper River Valley, where temperatures can drop to 60 degrees below zero, and the family recently relocated and built a cabin there because, they say, their former home of many years was seized and burned down for being in the wrong location on public land.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: "Alaskan Bush People" is a reality-documentary series that introduces the Brown family -- Billy, wife Ami and their seven grown children who -- according to Discovery -- are interesting because "they are unlike any other family in America." The channel says they are so far removed from civilization that they often go six to nine months each year without seeing an outsider. They refer to themselves as a "wolf pack" and, perhaps due to isolation, have their own accent and dialect. The Browns live in the Copper River Valley, where temperatures can drop to 60 degrees below zero, and the family recently relocated and built a cabin there because, they say, their former home of many years was seized and burned down for being in the wrong location on public land.

The channel says they are so far removed from civilization that they often go six to nine months each year without seeing an outsider. programme.desc: Dino the dog's anxiety level has the owner sacrificing her own mental health treatments; another dog, Dexter, is becoming increasingly nippy and confused; the final push at Bin City needs to reap big rewards.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Treating their dog's allergy plunges a young couple deep into debt; a hognose snake is reluctant to eat; early plans for a dog sanctuary are riding on a successful, well attended auction.

programme.desc: The boys must repair their old enclosures at Everglades Holiday Park to make space for endangered alligators; Tre is hired as an airboat captain, but soon wrecks his vessel.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Gator wrestlers reunite at Native Village, where Paul encounters a 14-foot, 1,500-pound nemesis; Jimmy is reminded of the death of his friend and mentor, Michael "Skeet" Johns.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson has a tall order in Delaware helping a veteran with PTSD whose therapy cat, Salem, stresses him out; the Cat Daddy deals with Bartholomew, a cat shredding the furniture and tearing up a marriage.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her; The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee-soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas; in East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer; on the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas Game Wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water; hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property; game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas and Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters; in East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps; an owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation; Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder; Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican; Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.desc: Lt. Col. Slater balances his prison duties with his responsibilities as a single father; former rodeo champ Cracker risks serious injury for another shot at glory; a local newspaper launches a smear campaign against Warden Cain.

programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters, and the wardens must handle an unruly captain; when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.
